## Summary
- What changed?
- Why did it change?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / repo tooling
- [ ] CI / automation

## Validation
- [ ] `python -m compileall src scripts`
- [ ] Local import smoke test
- [ ] `python scripts/run_weekly_pipeline.py`
- [ ] `python scripts/build_dashboard_data.py`
- [ ] Dashboard checked manually
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Notes
Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.

## Screenshots / sample output
If frontend, docs, or output format changed, include screenshots or snippets.
